pricing.subtitle: Pricing
pricing.title: Transparent Plans
pricing.description: Choose the perfect package for your cosmic journey.
pricing.custom: Need a custom package? Contact us for a tailored solution.

questions.question: How long does a typical project take?
questions.answer: Project timelines vary depending on scope and complexity. A typical branding project takes 4-6 weeks, while a full website development may take 8-12 weeks.

questions.question: Do you work with international clients?
questions.answer: Absolutely! We work with clients from all over the galaxy. Our team is equipped to handle different time zones and communication preferences.

questions.question: What is your payment structure?
questions.answer: We typically require a 50% deposit to begin work, with the remaining balance due upon project completion. For larger projects, we offer milestone-based payments.

questions.question: Do you offer ongoing support?
questions.answer: Yes! We offer various maintenance and support packages to ensure your digital presence continues to shine.
